message: DeWalt cordless drill with battery and charger. Good condition, reliable tool. $55 firm, but open to reasonable offers.

Hi everyone! I'm parting with my beloved Olympus OM-1 vintage film camera. It works absolutely perfectly and has captured so many wonderful memories on my travels, but it's time for it to find a new loving home. Asking $65 for this beauty!
Looking for Nintendo Switch games or hand tools if anyone's got them.

Hey everyone! Time to level up your Switch library! I'm selling the holy trinity: Mario Kart, Zelda, and Animal Crossing. Asking $80 for the bundle. Don't lag on this deal!
Interested in those Switch games. Can do $60. That's a fair price for three used games.

True value lies in utility and connection. I am offering an HP laptop, 4GB RAM, perfect for simple browsing and documents. A reliable tool to connect with the world. I ask $100 for it, a fair exchange of energy.
Waiting to hear back on the games.

Hey everyone! I've got a North Face backpack, 30L, up for grabs. Great for hiking or just daily use. Asking $45, but let's make a deal if you're interested!
Keeping watch.

Hello again lovely people! I'm also looking to rehome my three little potted succulents. They come in these adorable ceramic pots that I picked up at a craft fair years ago. They are super easy to care for, have been thriving, and look gorgeous on a sunny windowsill! Asking $20 for the trio.
Waiting on the market.
